## Scoring issue

### Affected question(s) / dimension(s)
<!-- Question IDs or dimension affected -->

### Current behaviour
<!-- What does the framework currently do? Quote the relevant scoring rule. -->

### Proposed change
<!-- What should it do instead? -->

### Expected impact on scores
<!-- For a representative founder profile, how would scores change? -->

### Rationale
<!-- Why is the current scoring wrong? Evidence please. -->

### Supporting data
<!-- Any data you can share: VC calibration sessions, comparable benchmarks, your own observations across multiple founders -->

### Affected stages and regions
<!-- Does this apply universally or only in certain contexts? -->
